creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Schumacher, Hardy, 26.09.07, 12:33h CEST:

> Hello Stefan,
> 
> I'm still working on the patch.
> On the website I saw an source-archive available for downloading. But
> after I've checked it, I figured out that this only contains source
> code, without any build scripts.
> 
> So best way is to use binary installer or zip file for linux (like
> current version).
> Zip file brings the problem that the downloadable file contains another
> zip file with the required data.
> 
> I will give you a feedback soon.

OK, thanks for your work on this! When you reply, please cc GNATS
(FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org) with the subject line as it is so any
patches or information are safely attached to the PR in the database and
can be picked up by any committer who has time to look at and commit it.

Best regards,
Stefan
